title: A Set of Ten on Rebirth, Etc.
text:
## 8. Ascetics and Brahmins

At Sāvatthī. “… they don’t understand rebirth …”

“… continued existence …”

“… grasping …”

“… craving …”

“… feeling …”

“… contact …”

“… the six sense fields …”

“… name and form …”

“… consciousness …”

“… choices … … they understand …”
